name: Reinforced Concrete Calculator
seo_title: Reinforced Concrete Calculator - Volume & Steel Weight
seo_description: Free reinforced concrete calculator: calculate volumen, cement_sacos from your largo, ancho, thickness. Instant results, not sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate materials for a reinforced concrete slab 6m x 4m with 25cm thickness and steel density of 120 kg/m³.

range_hints.kg_acero_m3: Typical: 80–120 kg/m³ for beams, 50–80 for slabs

result_context: For {volumen} m³ of reinforced concrete you need {cement_sacos} bags of cement, {sand_m3} m³ of sand, {gravel_m3} m³ of gravel and {acero_kg} kg of steel reinforcement.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Width x Thickness; Steel = Volume x kg_acero_per_m³
steps: Calculate steel: 6m³ x 120 kg/m³ = 720 kg of steel
Calculate aggregates: 6m³ x 0.55 = 3.30m³ sand, 6m³ x 0.80 = 4.80m³ gravel
mistakes: Underestimating the steel density required for critical structural elements
Not verifying that minimum concrete cover for steel reinforcement is 3-4cm
Forgetting that reinforced concrete requires proper vibration for compaction
description: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete with rebar.
desc: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete with rebar.
